mission: Turn Nexus into a single working loop UI using existing backend systems only.

requiredFlow: User completes intake or onboarding inputs
System shows a clear understanding summary
System shows a real task list
System shows one clearly selected next task
System explains why this is the next task
User sees one explicit execute button
Execution progress is visible in one focused place
A resulting product/UI change is shown in one focused place
User can confirm or reject the result
State updates visibly after the decision
A newly promoted next task appears
The loop can repeat again from the updated state
failureConditions: Any step is not visible in the live UI
Any step is visible but not actionable
Any step is actionable but disconnected from the next step
Any visible task lacks guided visual proof and explicit user confirmation

existingBackendCapabilitiesToExpose: AI design request / proposal / preview chain
Design proposal validation / review / apply / integration chain
Generated surface proof / accessibility / performance / brand validation

replaceAsPrimaryExperience: Dashboard-style top-shell as the main user journey
Fragmented proposal-review-first flow as the main product path
hideOrDeprioritizeFromPrimaryFlow: Secondary dashboards not required for the active loop
